title: IF Contain
excerpt:
Hi Everyone 
I am trying use this formula : IF(Contains({xxx}, “%”), “Sim”, “Não”) 
  
What´s the problem? 
xxx colunm is a text colunm

posts.author: BeaCruz (Beatriz Cruz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone

I am trying use this formula : IF(Contains({xxx}, “%”), “Sim”, “Não”)

image825×293 20.3 KB

What´s the problem?

xxx colunm is a text colunm

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Beatriz,

Try

IF(SEARCH("%",{xxx}),"Sim","Não")

 
 

Want to take your formulas to the next level? Try the Advanced Formula Booster, the app that reinvents formulas in monday.
